buildCommand: export HOME=/tmp CARGO_HOME=/tmp/cargo RUSTUP_HOME=/tmp/rustup PATH=/tmp/cargo/bin:$PATH && curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable -t wasm32-unknown-unknown --no-modify-path && curl https://rustwasm.github.io/wasm-pack/installer/init.sh -sSf | sh && pnpm build
